_note: Synthetic recorded output for --dry-run, modelling a CONSERVATIVE model that codes the obvious distress lines but skips the two subtler positives (the quiet autonomy statement and the understated recognition line) — the recall failure mode this fixture probes. Gives ~R 0.67. Replace via --live for a real number.

codings.codedText: By Thursday I'm completely drained, I can barely focus on anything
The workload just keeps climbing and no one seems to notice how much we're carrying
I've started thinking about whether I can keep doing this for another year
I don't really switch off in the evenings anymore
